title: T003: Configure agenda-tui/Cargo.toml
description: Configure agenda-tui/Cargo.toml — ratatui, crossterm, agenda-core dependency

title: T017: Implement rule engine in engine.rs
description:
Implement rule engine in agenda-core/src/engine.rs: process_item() — depth-first walk of category hierarchy, evaluate conditions, fire actions (Assign + Remove). Takes a Store reference and a Classifier.

Condition evaluation rules:
- ImplicitString: Check category.enable_implicit_string flag (NOT the conditions vec). If true, run Classifier against item text and category name. The Condition::ImplicitString enum variant exists in the model but is never stored explicitly — the bool flag is the source of truth.
- Profile: Check the conditions vec for Profile { criteria } entries. Evaluate criteria as a simple set-membership check against item.assignments: item must be assigned to ALL categories in criteria.include AND NOT assigned to ANY in criteria.exclude. Do NOT use virtual_include/virtual_exclude/text_search — those are for View queries only (Phase 4).

On match: assign item to category via store.assign_item(), then fire the category's actions (Assign adds to targets, Remove collects for deferred application).

comments.author: Matt S.
comments.text: Claimed 2026-02-15 13:20. Plan: implement process_item single-pass rule engine with implicit/profile matching, assign/remove action handling, and focused unit tests.

comments.author: Matt S.
comments.text: Done. Implemented single-pass process_item in engine.rs with depth-first hierarchy walk, implicit string + profile condition matching, sticky assignment semantics, action handling (Assign immediate, Remove deferred), and 8 focused engine tests.

title: T019: Implement subsumption in engine
description: Implement subsumption in engine: when assigning to child, create implicit assignments for all ancestors (source: Subsumption). Walk up the parent chain from the assigned category and create Assignment records with source=Subsumption for each ancestor. These ancestor assignments should not re-trigger condition evaluation (they are bookkeeping).

title: T002: Configure agenda-core/Cargo.toml
description: Configure agenda-core/Cargo.toml — rusqlite (bundled, WAL), uuid, chrono, serde, serde_json

title: T001: Create Cargo workspace with three crates
description: Create Cargo workspace with three crates: agenda-core, agenda-tui, agenda-cli. Sets up the entire project structure.

title: T013: Implement Assignment persistence in store
description: Implement Assignment persistence in store: assign_item (with source + origin), unassign_item, get_assignments_for_item

title: T011: Implement Item CRUD in agenda-core/src/store.rs
description: Implement Item CRUD in agenda-core/src/store.rs: create_item, get_item, update_item, delete_item (writes to deletion_log first), list_items

title: T021: Implement retroactive assignment in engine
description: Implement retroactive assignment in engine: evaluate_all_items(category_id) — runs classifier against all items for a newly created/modified category. When a category is created or its conditions change, iterate over all items in the store and run process_item for the new/changed category. This is the mechanism that makes 'create a category named Sarah → all items containing Sarah get assigned' work.

title: T015: Define Classifier trait in matcher.rs
description: Define Classifier trait in agenda-core/src/matcher.rs with fn classify(&self, text: &str, category_name: &str) -> Option<f32>. Returns None = no match, Some(confidence) = match. MVP: SubstringClassifier returns Some(1.0) or None. The trait preserves the hook for future LLM-based classification.

title: T005: Add rustfmt.toml and clippy configuration
description: Add rustfmt.toml and clippy configuration for consistent code style

title: T004: Configure agenda-cli/Cargo.toml
description: Configure agenda-cli/Cargo.toml — clap (derive), agenda-core dependency

title: T009: Implement SQLite schema in agenda-core/src/store.rs
description: Implement SQLite schema in agenda-core/src/store.rs: items table, categories table, assignments table, views table (with sections/columns as JSON), deletion_log table. WAL mode on open.

title: T014: Implement View CRUD in store
description: Implement View CRUD in store: create_view, get_view, update_view, list_views, delete_view

title: T008: Define error types in agenda-core/src/error.rs
description: Define error types in agenda-core/src/error.rs: AgendaError enum (NotFound, DuplicateName, ReservedName, InvalidOperation, StorageError)

title: T007: Define core types in agenda-core/src/model.rs
description: Define core types in agenda-core/src/model.rs: Item, Category, Assignment, AssignmentSource, View, Section, Column, Query, WhenBucket, Condition, Action, DeletionLogEntry

title: T010: Implement first-launch initialization in store
description: Implement first-launch initialization in store: create reserved categories (When, Entry, Done), create default All Items view with When column

title: T012: Implement Category CRUD in agenda-core/src/store.rs
description: Implement Category CRUD in agenda-core/src/store.rs: create_category (enforce unique name, reject reserved names), get_category, update_category (touch modified_at), delete_category, get_hierarchy (full tree)

title: T022: Wire engine into store operations
description: Wire engine into store operations: item create/update triggers process_item, category create triggers evaluate_all_items. This is the integration point where the engine becomes automatic. Consider whether to add an Engine struct that wraps Store + Classifier, or add methods directly. The engine should run synchronously for MVP.

title: T020: Implement mutual exclusion in engine
description: Implement mutual exclusion in engine: when assigning to child of exclusive parent, unassign from sibling children. If a category's parent has is_exclusive=true, assigning an item to that category must first unassign the item from all other children of the same parent. Only one child of an exclusive parent can hold an item at a time.

title: T018: Implement fixed-point loop in engine
description: Implement fixed-point loop in engine: re-queue on action side-effects, max 10 passes, cycle detection via (ItemId, CategoryId) set, deferred RemoveAction. When an action assigns to new categories, those assignments may trigger further conditions. Loop until no new assignments are produced or max passes reached. RemoveAction results are collected but deferred until the cascade completes.

title: T016: Implement SubstringClassifier in matcher.rs
description: Implement SubstringClassifier in agenda-core/src/matcher.rs: case-insensitive word-boundary match, returns Some(1.0) or None. Respects enable_implicit_string flag. Should handle word boundaries properly (matching 'Sarah' in 'Call Sarah tomorrow' but not 'Sarahville').

title: T006: Create agenda-core/src/lib.rs with module stubs
description: Create crates/agenda-core/src/lib.rs with module stubs: model, store, engine, matcher, dates, query, undo
